concerns.text: The verified datasets block contains medical RMSE parquet files from HuggingFace, not plant genomic/transcriptomic data required for this project. GEO series and Metabolomics Workbench experiments for herbivore-stress annotated Arabidopsis and Solanum must be identified and verified before proceeding.

Phase 0 data discovery is deferred, but there is no guarantee paired herbivore-stress annotated plant omics data exists at the required scale. This could render the research question unanswerable if suitable datasets cannot be found.
